wordplay_note: A man of tags and labels — categorizing reality
card_description: Tagomi (Nobusuke) (meaning "Japanese name suggesting honor") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Man in the High Castle*. Senior Japanese trade official in San Francisco who has a moral crisis after killing Germans. Name note: A man of tags and labels — categorizing reality. His meditation on a piece of jewelry pierces the veil between alternate worlds. First appears in *The Man in the High Castle*. Context: "Dick proposes to Le Guin that they are "twin outcomes" of a single underlying mystical experience."
first_work: The Man in the High Castle
work_list: The Man in the High Castle
